meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Template to Scale SaaS Apps
content.seo_description: Stop building basic apps. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to ship enterprise-grade SaaS faster. Expert guide for intermediate builders.
content.answer_block: Stop building boilerplate-heavy, basic apps that fail to scale. By leveraging the Antigravity project template combined with Claude Code, you automate architectural scaffolding and complex logic implementation. This stack allows you to focus on high-value business logic while slashing development time by 70% for your freelance clients.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking on your next freelance milestone, yet you are still fighting the same architectural battles: database migrations, auth boilerplate, and state management headaches. You are stuck in a loop of basic CRUD apps, unable to break into the high-ticket enterprise SaaS market because your setup is too brittle to handle complexity.

But the game has changed. The Antigravity project template isn't just code; it’s an opinionated, production-hardened foundation designed to handle the heavy lifting of modern SaaS. Paired with Claude Code, you are no longer just a developer—you are an architect orchestrating a high-velocity build engine.

steps.title: Initialize the Foundation
steps.description: Scaffold your project using the Antigravity CLI to ensure type safety and architecture consistency from the first commit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the enterprise-grade Antigravity template with Next.js 15, Drizzle ORM, and Auth.js pre-configured.

steps.title: Define Domain Models
steps.description: Use Claude Code to map your client's business requirements into the Antigravity schema definitions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the user requirements and generate a robust Drizzle schema for a multi-tenant subscription model.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate schema definitions based on the provided business specs'

steps.title: Architect API Endpoints
steps.description: Streamline backend logic by letting Claude Code implement the API layer according to the template patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement secure server actions for the defined tenant models, ensuring strict Zod validation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create server actions for all CRUD operations on the tenant schema'

steps.title: UI Component Sync
steps.description: Rapidly build the frontend by mapping the Antigravity design system components to your backend state.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a responsive dashboard component that consumes the tenant API endpoints using React Query.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate component code for the dashboard view using existing UI library patterns'

steps.title: Automated Testing Suite
steps.description: Ensure reliability by generating end-to-end tests for the critical path of your SaaS application.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create Playwright test suites covering the onboarding flow and subscription logic.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Write E2E tests for the authentication and subscription flow'

pro_tips: Always use the --dry-run flag with Claude Code when modifying core Antigravity config files to prevent breaking architectural integrity.
Inject your client's specific design tokens into the Antigravity theme file early to maintain brand consistency throughout the build.
Use Claude Code to document your custom logic within the template; it reduces maintenance friction when handing over to clients.
Leverage the Antigravity middleware hooks for global logging and performance monitoring to impress clients with production-grade telemetry.
Keep your prompt library for Claude Code in a version-controlled folder to ensure repeatability across different freelance projects.
content.next_steps: Once your core features are deployed, set up an automated CI/CD pipeline using the Antigravity deployment scripts to ensure your client's SaaS is always live and performant.
content.conversion_block: Stop wasting hours on boilerplate and start delivering high-end SaaS solutions that keep clients coming back. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
